hands_monday_2026_05_04_session_plan.execution_target: 2 hours maximum. All searches, post-checks, and note sends in a single session. Do not split across days.
priority_order: 1. IMAP SWEEP — mandatory before any LinkedIn action. If warm pipeline lead (1, 3, or 22) has replied: cancel their LinkedIn note immediately, log in CHANGELOG.md.
2. Batch 5 Day 3-6 connections (if initial sends fired Friday 2026-05-02): Google search → profile check → post check → send note. All in one session.
3. Warm pipeline nurture (leads 1/3/22 — only if IMAP confirms no email reply): Google search → profile check → 60-day post scan → send note or use pre-generated generic.
4. Write linkedin_profiles.json IMMEDIATELY after session — whether or not notes were sent. Record every search outcome.
hands_monday_2026_05_04_session_plan.post_reference_protocol: For each lead: (1) Google query, (2) open profile, (3) scroll for posts from last 60 days, (4) if post found: write bespoke post_reference note under 200 chars, (5) if no post: use pre-generated generic note. Verify char count before sending.
hands_monday_2026_05_04_session_plan.failure_protocol: If HANDS cannot execute within Day 3-6 window: log reason in CHANGELOG.md immediately. Do not skip silently. The window is not recoverable after Day 6.
